title: Youfoodz Pty Ltd — Consumer harm
investigation_objective: The ACCC commenced separate Federal Court proceedings (around 16 December 2025) alleging Youfoodz Pty Ltd, also owned by HelloFresh SE, breached the Australian Consumer Law over subscription cancellation traps: 39,408 customers were allegedly charged between October 2022 and November 2024 despite cancelling before the advertised cut-off.
scope: Subject of Federal Court proceedings brought by the ACCC alleging misleading subscription cancellation representations, ongoing; Alleged that over 39,000 customers were charged despite cancelling before the advertised deadline
